sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51980" key="kainoph/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καινο-πήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51980.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">new to misery</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δμωἴδες</foreign> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg004.perseus-grc1:363" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">363</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
